examples: For many, Rome is at best the imitator and the continuator of Greece on a larger scale.
China, for instance, has been evolving from being an imitator to a real innovator.
If you don't know where your ideas are coming from, you're probably imitating an imitator.
But when the church-trained belter from Georgia unleashes his pretty, gritty tenor, he's no mere imitator.
My first reaction to finding out I had an online imitator was to laugh.
